query: SELECT id, bookTitle, authorName, HEX(SUBSTRING(bookTitle, 8, 1)) as char_hex FROM book_profiles WHERE bookTitle LIKE '%Founder%Pocket%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT id, bookTitle, authorName, HEX(SUBSTRING(bookTitle, 8, 1)) as char_hex FROM book_profiles WHERE bookTitle LIKE '%Founder%Pocket%';
